# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_omevv_firmware_repository_profile_info (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `name` (String) Name of the OMEVV firmware repository profile. If *name* is provided, the module retrieves only specified firmware repository profile information.

### Read-Only

- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP Error.
- `msg` (String) Status of the firmare repository profile information for the retrieve operation.
- `profile_info` (String) Information on the vCenter.
